name: code-map
description: Interactive codebase-map skill: scan a repo, get a self-contained interactive HTML map.

plugins.name: code-map
plugins.description: Generate an interactive, self-contained HTML map of a codebase — pan/zoom node graph, detail panel, search, layer filters, flow walkthroughs, and matrices, every node cited to real files. Modes: architecture (whole system) and flow (one pipeline).
